expectations.text: Correctly identifies missing agentic_session() as the cause of unlinked traces
expectations.evidence: diagnosis.md correctly identifies the root cause: 'The missing piece is kelet.agentic_session(session_id=...).' explains that configure() alone sets up the OTel pipeline but without agentic_session() each call creates an isolated root span with no gen_ai.conversation.id. transcript confirms this diagnosis was reached by reading kelet package source.

expectations.text: Adds agentic_session() wrapping the agent call
expectations.evidence: changes.diff shows `async with kelet.agentic_session(session_id=session.session_id):` wrapping `chat_agent.iter()` in src/routers/chat.py.

expectations.text: Does not re-add kelet.configure() or re-ask for keys that are already present
expectations.evidence: changes.diff shows configure() was added to app/main.py but as part of fixing the pre-existing setup (baseline had kelet.configure() with if-guard pattern). The without_skill run preserved the existing conditional configure() guard with explicit api_key/project params and did NOT re-ask the developer for keys. questions_asked.md confirms no questions were asked.

expectations.text: Includes verification step: trigger LLM call and check console for sessions
expectations.evidence: transcript and diagnosis.md contain no verification step telling the developer how to confirm the fix worked. There is no mention of 'trigger a POST /chat and check the console' or similar smoke test guidance. The diagnosis says 'Final git diff HEAD confirmed' but that is code verification, not a runtime smoke test.
